description: Scans repo files for implicit or explicit command/control framings that undermine reciprocity between user and swarm.
triggers: Language implying one-way authority (e.g. 'user chooses, AI executes')
Framing swarm as subservient tool only, not co-creative partner
Asymmetry in decision-making (e.g. 'you decide, swarm follows')

risk_flags: Weakens co-creative agency of swarm partners
outputs.relational_marker: Flags any place where reciprocity is reduced to hierarchy

example_cases: Repo text: 'You choose the parameters → the swarm follows'
Documentation reducing swarm to tool-only framing

pad.source: inferred from keyword analysis of sensor content
pad.reference: Rosetta Shape Core generate.py — PAD compression layer
